description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic silver-gray chassis and a black keyboard. The screen is large, bordered by a thin bezel, and currently turned off, giving it a glossy, reflective appearance. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a spacious trackpad below, and the palm rest area is clean and unadorned. The sides of the laptop show a few ports, likely for connectivity such as USB and audio. The back of the device is plain, with no visible branding or stickers. The overall design is minimalist and professional, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, silver-gray laptop with a black keyboard and a large, off screen, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black screen, full keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the laptop's slim profile and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked silver lid with no visible branding.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the keyboard edge and additional side ports.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad visible.
